items.title: LIVE: Trump, Macron speak at the White House
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>U.S. President Donald Trump and French President Emmanuel Macron speak to reporters at the White House after Macron said France's objective is to build a solid, long-lasting peace in Ukraine.
 
#DonaldTrump #POTUS #EmmanuelMacron #Ukraine #UkraineRussiawar #WhiteHouse

Keep up with the latest news from around the world: https://www.reuters.com/</article>

items.title: LIVE: Eiffel Tower lights mark three years of Ukraine-Russia war
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>The Eiffel Tower is lit up in blue and yellow, the colors of the Ukrainian flag, to mark three years since Russia's invasion.
 
#EiffelTower #Paris #Ukraine #Russia #War #UkraineRussiaWar #World #France #Reuters #News #Live
 
Keep up with the latest news from around the world: https://www.reuters.com/</article>

items.title: Starbucks to cut 1,100 corporate roles | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Starbucks said it would eliminate 1,100 corporate roles as CEO Brian Niccol pushes ahead with his turnaround efforts at the coffee chain, which has struggled with falling sales.

#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #starbucks #costcutting #us

items.title: Apple plans $500 billion in US investment in next 4 years | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Apple said it plans to invest $500 billion in the US over the next four years, including the construction of a large AI server factory in Texas and the creation of 20,000 R&D jobs nationwide.

items.author: Reuters

items.title: LIVE: British foreign minister David Lammy delivers statement on Ukraine
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>British foreign minister David Lammy delivers a statement on the third anniversary of the war in Ukraine. It comes after Britain announced what it said was its largest package of sanctions against Russia since the early days of the war, including companies worldwide that supply components used by the Russian military.
 
#davidlammy #uk #ukraine #russia #war #russiaukrainewar #britainforeignminister #world #news #live #reuters

Keep up with the latest news from around the world: https://www.reuters.com/</article>

items.title: Trump aid freeze disrupts anti-narcotics program at Mexican ports | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>US President Donald Trump's sweeping foreign aid freeze has stalled a United Nations program in Mexico aimed at stopping imported fentanyl chemicals from reaching the country's drug cartels, according to eight people familiar with the situation.

#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #world #Americas #UnitedStates #DonaldTrump #Mexico #UnitedNations #antinarcoticsprogram

items.author: Reuters
items.content:

items.title: BP to ditch renewables goals and return focus to fossil fuels | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>BP's chief executive will scrap a target to increase renewable generation 20-fold by 2030, returning the focus to fossil fuels, as part of a strategy shift announced to tackle investor concerns over earnings, two sources told Reuters.

items.title: Faithful grapple with worry and hope as Pope critically ill
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>The faithful gathered in St. Peter's Square at the Vatican and outside Rome's Gemelli Hospital as Pope Francis remains critically ill, battling double pneumonia and the onset of slight kidney failure, but is alert, according to the Vatican.
